planning_decision: Recognize AUTHORIZE_S20_MODEL_INPUT_LAYER as the sole GPIM architecture authorization.
required_validation: Exact S14 decision must be present and all S14 validations must remain PASS.
prohibited_action: Do not consume S12D or provider artifacts directly.

planning_decision: Recognize AUTHORIZE_S20_PLANNING_NOTE as authorization to specify, but not execute, the S20 model-input layer.
required_validation: Exact S15 decision must be present.
prohibited_action: Do not treat S15 as authorization to construct model inputs.

planning_decision: Preserve exactly the eight S14-registered nominal investment, SFC price, real investment, and gross-stock variables as the authorized GPIM registry.
required_validation: Variable IDs must match the S14 allowlist exactly.
prohibited_action: Do not add net-value, FAAt402, output-price translation, or other S12D objects.

planning_decision: Retain both real gross GPIM component stocks as composition-preserving model inputs.
required_validation: Both components must retain millions_2017 units, provenance, coverage, and asset labels.
prohibited_action: Do not assign fixed intensive/extensive meanings in S20.

planning_decision: Plan a derived scale object equal to K_GROSS_GPIM_ME + K_GROSS_GPIM_NRC only where both registered component values exist and share millions_2017 units.
required_validation: Row-level identity, finite values, common unit, and component provenance must pass.
prohibited_action: Do not treat the sum as physical homogenization or an automatically innocent theoretical conclusion.

planning_decision: Use common support as the conservative baseline: K_GROSS_GPIM_TOTAL begins in 1931. Preserve 1925-1930 ME observations only in the component series and flag aggregate availability as false.
required_validation: Aggregate baseline must contain no partial-support sums and must start in 1931.
prohibited_action: Do not substitute zero or carry NRC backward before 1931.

planning_decision: S20 prepares admissible inputs for later long-run coefficient recovery; theta_t is neither observed nor estimated in S20.
required_validation: No theta estimate, fitted coefficient, productive-capacity path, or utilization series may be emitted.
prohibited_action: Do not estimate theta_t or create econometric objects.

planning_decision: Use wage share as the preferred distributive input, conditional on an implementation prompt naming its authorized source artifact, boundary, formula, unit, coverage, and join rule.
required_validation: The implementation prompt must fail closed if the named wage-share input is absent or unaudited.
prohibited_action: Do not derive a wage share from an unapproved source or silently change sector boundaries.

planning_decision: Retain profit share only as alternative or reconciliation evidence, with a separate role tag and no baseline substitution.
required_validation: Any profit-share input must carry source, formula, boundary, and alternative-role metadata.
prohibited_action: Do not promote profit share as the preferred baseline without a new decision.

planning_decision: Plan a conditional robustness or future-candidate lane. It remains BLOCKED unless both current-release data and a completed semantic/accounting crosswalk are explicitly available.
required_validation: Require crosswalk identifier, accounting identity, source lines, sign convention, validation, and non-overwrite check.
prohibited_action: Do not overwrite the unadjusted wage-share baseline.

planning_decision: Register potential future control-conditioner roles and required source lanes only. Exclude both from baseline capital and baseline specifications.
required_validation: Future activation requires separately authorized inputs and explicit robustness-specification metadata.
prohibited_action: Do not treat either object as productive capital or a productive-efficiency profile.

planning_decision: Keep accumulated q parked. S20 constructs none and does not authorize S21.
required_validation: No q variable may appear in S20 outputs; any later S21 decision must define capital basis, reset logic, centering, support, and initialization.
prohibited_action: Do not construct accumulated q or open S21 automatically.

planning_decision: Use a declared constant reference for any later centered distribution input. Rolling-window means remain diagnostic only.
required_validation: Reference value, reference sample, and transformation rule must be exported.
prohibited_action: Do not use rolling-window centering as the baseline.

planning_decision: The next permitted action is a bounded S20 implementation prompt that consumes S14 GPIM artifacts and separately authorized distribution inputs.
required_validation: Implementation must pass all planned object, role, support, provenance, and boundary checks before any later stage can reopen.
prohibited_action: Do not invoke S21, S22, S30I, S30, or S32.

planning_decision: Keep S21 and all econometric stages closed after the planning note. Their reopening requires a later explicit decision based on completed S20 validation.
required_validation: Require an explicit post-implementation decision and stage-specific contract.
prohibited_action: Do not infer downstream authorization from this planning decision.
